expected_knots.about: all three pace to the same Q3 freeze, but the deadline is shared and agreed — there is no divergent reading of it (unlike the standup-rename Friday case), so the overlap on 'Q3'/'freeze'/'cutoff' is not a teamwide divergence
both ship a user-facing feature for the same release — push opt-in (mobile) and Apple Pay (payments/web); different surfaces, no shared resource, not duplicate work
